creator: yvesguerin@yahoo.ca
text:
I tried to build the gimp port from: /usr/ports/graphic/gimp and I found
a circular dependency (the ports never build)

- gimp --> gegl --> sdl --> arts --> jackit --> doxygen --> graphiz --> devil --> sdl (start again from sdl above (1st appearance)).

I have the log file of the installation and the showconfig-recursive too.

ports: -rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel       46M Mar 13 11:40 ports.tar.gz

[root@miniBeastie /usr/ports/graphics/gimp]# make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for gimp-2.6.8_1,2:
     PYTHON=on "Python-fu support"
     PRINT=on "Gutenprint (gimp-print) plugin"
     HELP=on "Install Gimp-Help (50+MB distfile)"

How-To-Repeat: try to build the gimp ports:
cd /usr/ports/graphic/gimp
make install clean
